positive: Minimalist, abstract geometric composition featuring stylized woodland creatures and celestial elements. A central silhouette of a stylized fox with flowing tail, interacting with geometric constellations and crescent moons. The design should incorporate interlocking nature motifs (leaves, acorns, branches) formed by clean, single-line art and solid black shapes against a creamy off-white background. Style: Mid-century modern Scandinavian graphic design meets Art Nouveau fluidity. Color palette: Deep forest emerald, muted dusty rose, and rich indigo blue, utilizing high contrast and elegant negative space. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, and highly scalable for apparel printing. Focus on clean vectors, bold outlines, and crisp edges. Aspect Ratio: Square.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, grainy, photorealism, text, watermark, low contrast, messy, dirty, bad anatomy, extra limbs, writing, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, muted colors
